_readme: Add one object per blog post, NEWEST FIRST. `slug` must match the post's filename in blog/posts/ (without .html). See blog/README.md for the full 2-step publishing workflow.

posts.title: Manage Staff in Nepal Using Excel (No HR Software): Attendance, Leaves, Roster and Monthly Payroll
posts.excerpt: A six-sheet Excel workbook — Master, Attendance, Leave, Holidays, Roster, Payroll — that runs HR for a Nepali SME without paying for HR software. Formulas, SSF/EPF/CIT/TDS, female rebate and a worked payslip.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Fixed Assets Register in Nepal: Build It From Scratch, Maintain It, Track It
posts.excerpt: A Chartered Accountant's step-by-step guide to building a Fixed Assets Register from scratch — asset coding, Block A–E depreciation under Schedule 2 of the Income Tax Act 2058, physical verification workflow and a copy-ready Excel schema.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Nepal's Multi-Rate VAT is Here (FY 2083/84): 5% on Ride-Sharing and Electricity — What Businesses Must Do
posts.excerpt: Finance Act 2083 ends Nepal's single-rate VAT era. From Shrawan 1, 2083 ride-sharing platforms and residential electricity attract 5% VAT — with a lifeline exemption for households under 50 units. A CA's compliance playbook.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Automating Tally Prime with Claude via MCP (2026): A Chartered Accountant's Practical Guide
posts.excerpt: How Anthropic's Model Context Protocol lets Claude read and write Tally Prime — architecture, setup, ten real accounting automations, privacy limits, and the Excel Kida walkthrough on YouTube.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Filing VAT Returns in Nepal 2026: The Complete Practical Guide for Small Businesses
posts.excerpt: Registration thresholds, the monthly filing cycle, e-filing on ird.gov.np, input credit rules, penalties and the eight mistakes that catch most businesses out.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Nepal's 10% Female Tax Rebate (FY 2082/83): Married vs Unmarried Women — Which Filing Status Wins?
posts.excerpt: How Nepal's 10% rebate for women works, why couple filing loses it, and worked NPR examples comparing individual vs couple filing at each salary level.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: 25 Excel Formulas Every Finance Professional Must Know in 2026 (With Examples)
posts.excerpt: The essential Excel formulas for accounting, audit and tax — XLOOKUP, SUMIFS, INDEX/MATCH, XIRR, LET, LAMBDA, PIVOTBY and more, each with a copy-ready example.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Types of AI Tools 2026: Which One to Use for What (Complete Guide)
posts.excerpt: A complete 2026 map of AI tools — Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity, NotebookLM, Claude Code, Cursor, image/video generators and meeting AI — and the right use for each.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: NotebookLM: 20 Practical Uses for Professionals and Students (2026 Guide)
posts.excerpt: How Google's source-grounded AI notebook differs from a chatbot, plus 20 concrete uses in professional life and study, Audio Overviews, Mind Maps, and privacy limits.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Google Drive & OneDrive Desktop Sync: The Complete Setup Guide for Business Teams (2026)
posts.excerpt: Step-by-step 2026 setup of Google Drive for desktop and OneDrive — Stream vs Mirror, Files On-Demand, PC folder backup, Shared drives, security — for professional teams.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: Nepal Salary Tax Slabs FY 2082/83 (2025/26): Full Table, Deductions and the FY 2083/84 Overhaul
posts.excerpt: Complete slab table for individual and couple assessees, deductions before slabs, SSF 1% waiver, worked example, and the unified schedule proposed for FY 2083/84.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: TDS Rates in Nepal FY 2082/83: Complete Rate Chart, Deadlines and Compliance Guide
posts.excerpt: Full TDS chart for salary, rent, services, dividends, interest and contracts under Sections 87–92 of the Income Tax Act, deposit deadlines, penalties and e-TDS filing.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant

posts.title: VAT and Turnover Tax on Air Tickets in Nepal: The Complete 2026 Guide
posts.excerpt: How 13% VAT applies to domestic and international air tickets, the 2%/5% turnover tax on foreign airlines under Section 70A, IATA/BSP implementation issues and transitional waivers.
posts.author: Upaj Manandhar, Chartered Accountant
